steps.title: Use the dominant-view clue
steps.content: The passage says a pro-innovation bias is part of the “dominant view” and needs a corrective. The blank must mean that this bias is widespread throughout studies of the history of technology.

steps.title: Select the widespread meaning
steps.content: Choice A means replaces, but the bias does not replace the studies. Choice C means shortens, and Choice D means incites; neither fits. “Pervades” means spreads through or is present throughout, matching the dominant-view clue. The answer is B.
